US: US1 - As a user I want to switch between an "All Chats" view and an "Unread" view so that I can focus exclusively on pending items when needed
Title: Unread filter on All Chats dashboard
Expectation: - SHOULD transition to the filtered view

Title: Unread-only message visibility
Expectation: - SHOULD display only messages with "Unread" status

AC: AC2 - Switching back to All Chats
Title: All Chats filter on Unread view
Chronological order after removing filter
Expectation: - SHOULD display all messages (Read and Unread) in chronological order

US: US2 - As a user I want the "Unread" view to filter out all read messages and only display those with an active unread status
Step:
1. NAVIGATE to chat dashboard with 10 messages (7 Read, 3 Unread)
2. APPLY the "Unread" filter
Title: Unread filter with mixed messages
Filtered list with three Unread messages
Expectation: - SHOULD display only the 3 Unread messages in the list

AC: AC2 - Empty state for Unread filter
Step:
1. NAVIGATE to chat dashboard with no Unread messages
2. CLICK on the "Unread" filter
Title: Empty inbox after applying Unread filter
Expectation: - SHOULD display "No unread messages" empty state or placeholder

US: US3 - As a user I want the message I am currently reading to remain visible in the "Unread" list so that I don't lose my place or feel disoriented by the list shifting immediately while I am viewing it
AC: AC1 - Opening an unread message (Sticky View)
Step:
1. NAVIGATE to "Unread" filter view
2. CLICK on an unread message (Message A)
Title: Message status after opening unread message
Expectation: - SHOULD change Message A status to Read

Title: Message A visibility after opening
Expectation: - SHOULD keep Message A visible in the current list view

AC: AC2 - Removing previously read message upon new selection
Step:
1. READ Message A in "Unread" filter view (Message A still visible)
2. CLICK on a different unread message (Message B)
Title: Message A removal after selecting Message B
Expectation: - SHOULD immediately remove Message A from the Unread list

Title: Message B visibility after selection
Expectation: - SHOULD mark Message B as Read but remain visible in the list

Step:
1. READ a message in "Unread" view (message still visible due to sticky logic)
2. NAVIGATE to "All Chats"
3. CLICK back into "Unread" filter
Title: Previously read message after navigation cycle
Expectation: - SHOULD no longer display the previously read message in the Unread list
